title: The Devil Wears Prada
posterAlt: The Devil Wears Prada (2006) movie poster
tmdbOverview: A young woman from the Midwest gets more than she bargained for when she moves to New York to become a writer and ends up as the assistant to the tyrannical, larger-than-life editor-in-chief of a major fashion magazine.
synopsis: Released in 2006, The Devil Wears Prada is a drama and comedy film from United States. It holds a solid 7.0 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
